metadata.description: Skills from the Daylight Computer Club — teach your AI to make apps belong on the DC-1 tablet.

plugins.name: daylight-ify
plugins.description: Port, redesign, preview, and teach: four skills plus working tools (DC-1 simulator/auditor, color→grayscale mapper, icon generator, collision tests, WebView shell template) that turn any web app into something at home on the Daylight DC-1's grayscale reflective screen.
